name: HHV6B_full_genome
description: Human herpesvirus 6B (HHV-6B) beta-herpesvirus: linear dsDNA ~162 kb with 8 kb DRL/DRR direct repeats and a ~144 kb unique long region. ~90% nucleotide identity to HHV-6A; species-defining differences cluster in U12-U24, U47, U83, and U86-U100. Causative agent of exanthem subitum (roseola) and frequently reactivates in transplant recipients. Like HHV-6A, integrates at human telomeres producing ciHHV-6B inheritance.
expected_copy_count: 1 per cell; can be chromosomally integrated
